documents.text: The [BRAND] [MODEL] pressure washer is a compact electric unit designed for patios, bikes, siding, and garden tools. Its 1800-watt motor delivers up to 2000 PSI and 1.4 GPM for reliable everyday cleaning without excessive noise. A 20-foot high-pressure hose, 35-foot power cord, and integrated detergent tank improve reach and convenience. The adjustable spray wand includes 0°, 25°, and soap settings for different surfaces. Built-in wheels and an onboard accessory rack keep storage simple, while the automatic total stop system helps reduce wear and power consumption between trigger pulls.

Built for heavier outdoor jobs, the [BRAND] [MODEL] gas pressure washer uses a 212cc engine to produce 3200 PSI and 2.5 GPM. It handles concrete driveways, fencing, decks, and exterior walls with strong, consistent pressure. The welded steel frame protects core components, while 10-inch pneumatic wheels move easily across uneven ground. This model includes five quick-connect nozzles, a 25-foot kink-resistant hose, and a downstream detergent injector for soap application. A low-oil shutdown feature and reinforced spray gun add durability for homeowners wanting dependable seasonal performance.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] cordless pressure washer offers flexible cleaning where outlets and garden hoses are limited. Powered by a 40V battery platform, it draws from a bucket, tank, or hose connection for light washing around campsites, balconies, cars, and outdoor furniture. Pressure reaches up to 650 PSI with a 0.8 GPM flow, making it suitable for gentle maintenance rather than deep stripping. The multi-pattern nozzle switches quickly between mist, fan, and jet modes. Lightweight construction, a removable battery, and a compact storage case make the [BRAND] [MODEL] easy to transport.

Designed for frequent household use, the [BRAND] [MODEL] electric pressure washer balances strong cleaning output with simple controls. Its brushless motor provides up to 2300 PSI and 1.6 GPM, helping remove mud, mildew, and road film from vehicles, steps, and brick paths. The unit features a telescoping handle, large rear wheels, and a reel-mounted 25-foot hose for tidy storage. Included accessories are a turbo nozzle, variable fan nozzle, foam cannon, and surface cleaner attachment. The [BRAND] [MODEL] also uses a total stop system to reduce pump strain when the trigger is released.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] pressure washer is engineered for serious residential cleaning with a durable axial cam pump and 2000-watt electric motor. Delivering 2500 PSI at 1.5 GPM, it is effective on stone patios, garage floors, and weathered outdoor furniture. A 22-foot hose and 16-foot extension lance help reach higher areas such as garage doors and low rooflines. The detergent bottle connects directly to the spray gun for quicker soap application. Waterproof control switches, onboard nozzle holders, and thermal motor protection enhance safety and day-to-day convenience in changing outdoor conditions.

For contractors and farm maintenance, the [BRAND] [MODEL] commercial pressure washer combines a 420cc engine with a triplex pump to generate 4000 PSI and 4.0 GPM. This high-output machine is suited to stripping grime from equipment, trailers, retaining walls, and large paved areas. A heavy-duty steel cart supports the pump and engine, while oversized pneumatic tires improve maneuverability on gravel or dirt. The package includes a professional spray gun, 50-foot steel-braided hose, and five quick-change tips. An external unloader and easy-access service points support longer operation and simplified maintenance.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] wall-mount pressure washer is ideal for garages, workshops, or detailing bays where floor space matters. Its electric induction motor delivers 2100 PSI and 1.3 GPM with steady, low-vibration operation. A fixed bracket keeps the unit elevated, while a swivel hose reel manages the 60-foot pressure hose neatly. This setup works well for washing cars, motorcycles, bins, and workshop floors. The [BRAND] [MODEL] comes with a foam bottle, quick-connect lance, and four spray nozzles. Remote power control on the trigger handle adds convenience during repetitive cleaning tasks.

Made for vehicle owners, the [BRAND] [MODEL] pressure washer focuses on controlled cleaning and paint-safe performance. The 1900-watt motor produces up to 1900 PSI and 1.5 GPM, enough to lift road salt, bugs, and wheel brake dust without excessive force on trim or decals. It includes a foam cannon, soft-bristle wash brush, underbody wand, and 25-foot hose. The variable-pressure trigger lets users lower intensity around emblems and mirrors. Compact vertical storage, anti-tip wheels, and a detergent shutoff valve make the [BRAND] [MODEL] practical for regular driveway detailing.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] hot water pressure washer is built for grease, oil, and heavy residue in workshops, loading areas, and equipment bays. Its diesel-fired burner heats water for more effective cleaning, while the pump delivers 3000 PSI at 3.0 GPM. A stainless steel heating coil improves durability under demanding conditions. The machine includes a 35-foot high-pressure hose, insulated trigger gun, and adjustable thermostat for tailored performance. Mounted on a reinforced frame with locking casters, the [BRAND] [MODEL] is easier to position around commercial spaces where mobility and cleaning power are equally important.

Homeowners looking for simple setup will appreciate the [BRAND] [MODEL], a lightweight electric pressure washer with clear controls and practical accessories. It provides 1700 PSI and 1.2 GPM, ideal for rinsing windows, garden edging, grills, and small decks. The quick-start design connects easily to a standard outlet and garden hose, with no fuel mixing or engine upkeep required. A rotating nozzle adjusts from a wide fan to a concentrated stream, and the detergent bottle supports soap-assisted cleaning. Integrated cable hooks and a compact footprint help the [BRAND] [MODEL] fit neatly in sheds or closets.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] pressure washer combines portable size with surprising output for apartment courtyards, boats, and weekend property maintenance. Its 1450-watt motor reaches 1600 PSI and 1.3 GPM, offering enough force to remove dirt from tiles, planters, and outdoor seating. A self-priming function allows water intake from a stored tank when a tap is not nearby. The package includes a short trigger gun, extension lance, patio nozzle, and mesh inlet filter. With a slim body, carry handle, and quick-lock couplings, the [BRAND] [MODEL] stores easily and sets up in minutes.

Designed for demanding residential and light commercial use, the [BRAND] [MODEL] features a brushless induction motor paired with a brass-headed pump for durability. Output reaches 2800 PSI and 1.8 GPM, making it suitable for masonry, pool surrounds, siding, and utility trailers. The reinforced 30-foot hose resists abrasion, and the included turbo nozzle speeds up work on stubborn stains. Users can switch to the fan tip for more delicate surfaces. The [BRAND] [MODEL] also includes onboard GFCI protection, a removable detergent tank, and a fold-down handle to simplify transport and winter storage.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] pressure washer is a mid-range gas model tailored for larger properties and recurring exterior cleaning. Its 224cc engine produces 3300 PSI and 2.4 GPM, giving enough power to tackle stone paths, fencing, steps, and weathered brick. A cast aluminum pump housing helps reduce weight while maintaining durability. This unit includes a 30-foot high-pressure hose, four quick-connect spray tips, and a soap nozzle for pre-treatment. The balanced frame, soft-grip handle, and never-flat wheels make the [BRAND] [MODEL] easier to move around outbuildings, driveways, and uneven yard surfaces.

For users who need quiet operation, the [BRAND] [MODEL] electric pressure washer runs with reduced motor noise while still delivering effective cleaning results. The 2000-watt system generates 2200 PSI and 1.4 GPM for washing composite decking, shutters, stone borders, and outdoor play equipment. A pressure selection dial helps match output to the surface being cleaned, reducing the risk of damage. The kit includes a rotating turbo nozzle, fan spray lance, foam sprayer, and patio cleaner disc. Sealed wheels, a corrosion-resistant pump, and onboard accessory clips round out this versatile [BRAND] [MODEL].

The [BRAND] [MODEL] trailer-mounted pressure washer is intended for mobile cleaning services, farms, and maintenance crews covering multiple sites. Powered by a commercial-grade engine, it delivers 3500 PSI and 3.5 GPM, with a direct-drive pump designed for reliable field use. The setup includes a welded trailer frame, hose reel, 100-gallon water tank, and 50-foot pressure hose for independent operation when a water source is unavailable. A chemical injection system supports detergent and degreaser use. LED trailer lights, safety chains, and lockable storage boxes make the [BRAND] [MODEL] practical for transport and daily deployment.

The [BRAND] [MODEL] pressure washer is a compact hybrid design that can run from AC power or an optional battery pack for added flexibility. In electric mode, it delivers up to 1500 PSI and 1.1 GPM, while battery operation provides lower-pressure rinsing for tools, bicycles, and outdoor mats. The lightweight body features a carry handle, onboard nozzle storage, and a 15-foot hose suited to quick cleanup jobs. An adjustable 5-in-1 nozzle reduces accessory changes, and the included siphon hose can draw water from a bucket. The [BRAND] [MODEL] suits small homes and portable cleaning needs.
